testcase.name: 🚨 CRITICAL: White Screen Fix Validation › VALIDATION 1: Main app loads without white screen
🚨 CRITICAL: White Screen Fix Validation › VALIDATION 2: SimpleLauncher navigation button visible and functional
🚨 CRITICAL: White Screen Fix Validation › VALIDATION 3: SimpleLauncher component renders with all UI elements
🚨 CRITICAL: White Screen Fix Validation › VALIDATION 4: API connectivity to backend port 3001 works
🚨 CRITICAL: White Screen Fix Validation › VALIDATION 5: Process launch/stop workflow operates correctly
🚨 CRITICAL: White Screen Fix Validation › VALIDATION 6: Error handling displays correctly
🚨 CRITICAL: White Screen Fix Validation › VALIDATION 7: Browser console clean of critical errors
🚨 CRITICAL: White Screen Fix Validation › VALIDATION 8: Responsive design across viewport sizes
🔄 REGRESSION: End-to-End Workflow Validation › REGRESSION 1: Complete user journey - Home → SimpleLauncher → Workflow
🔄 REGRESSION: End-to-End Workflow Validation › REGRESSION 2: Page refresh preserves functionality
🔄 REGRESSION: End-to-End Workflow Validation › REGRESSION 3: Multiple browser tabs maintain functionality
🌐 CROSS-BROWSER: Compatibility Validation › BROWSER CHROMIUM: SimpleLauncher loads and functions
🌐 CROSS-BROWSER: Compatibility Validation › BROWSER FIREFOX: SimpleLauncher loads and functions
🌐 CROSS-BROWSER: Compatibility Validation › BROWSER WEBKIT: SimpleLauncher loads and functions
